name: case-solvers
description: A bd-backed, parallel-capable coding workflow: /case (frontier model) authors stories/epics in Beads and /refine revises them, /board renders the backlog, /solve (any model tier) implements one in an isolated git worktree, /evaluate merges it after human review, /orchestrate (frontier model) automates the solve-review-land loop for a whole epic behind one final PR. Dependency-aware; bd stays hidden behind the commands. Requires the bd (Beads) CLI.

interface.shortDescription: A bd-backed, parallel-capable coding workflow: author, refine, solve, evaluate, and orchestrate stories.
interface.longDescription: Manage a Beads-backed engineering workflow from story authoring through isolated implementation, human-reviewed merge, and whole-epic orchestration behind a single final PR.
interface.defaultPrompt: Show the Case Solvers board and help me choose the next appropriate workflow action.
